name: DeepSeek-V4-Pro
_comment_n_kv: MLA approximation (same family as DeepSeek-R1): real KV cache = compressed latent + RoPE; n_kv=5 gives ~3% under on KV footprint. MLA stores compressed latent, not separate K/V heads.
_comment_k_active: 6 routed experts + 1 shared expert (always active). Shared expert approximated by k=7.
_comment_caveats: Architecture-specific extensions NOT modeled: Compressed Sparse Attention (CSA), Heavily Compressed Attention (HCA), Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) head with num_nextn_predict_layers=1, sliding_window=128 on attention. These reduce real per-token compute and KV traffic vs the framework's MHA/MoE generic forms; predicted decode latency is therefore an upper bound.
